name: @rynfar/meridian
description: Local Anthropic API powered by your Claude Max subscription. One subscription, every agent.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build bin/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target bun --external @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/server.js --target bun --external @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.test: bun test --path-ignore-patterns '**/*session-store*' && bun test src/__tests__/proxy-session-store.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/session-store-pruning.test.ts && bun test src/__tests__/proxy-session-store-locking.test.ts

author: rynfar
